title: CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
input_format: Project configuration with language, test framework, deployment target, and branch strategy
output_format: Complete GitHub Actions workflow YAML with CI and CD jobs
example_input: { language: 'node', testCmd: 'npm test', deployTarget: 'aws-ecs', branches: { main: 'production', develop: 'staging' } }
example_output: GitHub Actions YAML with lint, test, build, and deploy jobs with proper dependencies and environment protection
constraints:
- Must include lint, test, build, and deploy stages
- Jobs must have proper dependencies (needs)
- Must use environment protection rules for production
- Must cache dependencies for speed
- Must use secrets for credentials
function_signature: function generateCICDPipeline(config: { language: string; testCmd: string; buildCmd: string; deployTarget: string; branches: Record<string, string> }): string
